item.title: Lindsey Vonn Slams 'Haters' Who Called Her 'Selfish' for Taking an Olympics Spot with Torn ACL
item.description: Vonn, 41, dominated her World Cup season prior to the 2026 Winter Olympics, where she crashed 13 seconds into her downhill run

item.title: Woman, 29, Chooses to Finally Embrace 'Silver' Hair After Going Gray at Age 13 (Exclusive)
item.description: “This is what I was always meant to look like,” Haley Zirbel tells PEOPLE

item.title: Tracy Morgan ‘Cried’ Watching “Dark Side of Comedy ”Doc Episode About His Toughest Moments (Exclusive)
item.description: Morgan was the subject of a 2023 episode of Vice's documentary series, which chronicled the 10-day coma he was in after a deadly car crash in 2014

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Shares Candid Family Throwback Photos of Eric Dane and Their 2 Daughters After His Death
item.description: Gayheart and Dane separated in 2018, though she remained his primary caretaker throughout his ALS journey

item.title: Bill Mazeroski, MLB World Series Champion Known for ‘One of the Greatest Home Runs in Baseball History,’ Dies at 89
item.description: The Pittsburgh Pirates legend, whose famous home run clinched the 1960 World Series for his team, died on Feb. 20
